name: open-pouch
description: AI Agents & Workflows built with Output.ai for open-pouch

scripts.output:worker: npm run output:worker:install && npm run output:worker:build && npm run output:worker:start
scripts.output:worker:watch: npx nodemon --watch src --watch package.json --ext ts,js,json,prompt,md --ignore 'dist/**' --ignore '**/*.spec.*' --ignore '**/*.test.*' --exec 'npm run output:worker'
scripts.desktop:build: npm run output:worker:build && npm run desktop:assets
